name: integration_landscaping_might_be_the_most_obvious_ro
method: Landscaping might be the most obvious roll-up in home services right now

phases.name: scrape
steps: Google Maps scrape: landscaping + top 20 metros
Yelp scrape: lawn care + landscaping, filter 4+ stars
Extract: business name, owner name, phone, email, website, review count, years active

phases.name: qualify
steps: Score each biz: web presence gap (no SEO = higher score), review volume 20-200 (not too small, not corporate), domain age signal (5+ years = established owner-op), no social presence (easy win to offer)
Enrich: find owner LinkedIn, personal email via Hunter.io free tier

phases.name: outreach
steps: Generate personalized cold email: reference their specific city + review count + missing SEO signal

Angle: 'landscaping businesses are being acquired at 3-5x EBITDA right now — operators who run clean digital ops get top offers. I help local landscapers get acquisition-ready in 90 days.' NOT selling consulting. Selling exit optionality.
Send via SMTP (no paid tool needed)
